function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0005
alias: northstar_followup_pack
issued_on: 2026-03-20
total_eur: 420
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Northstar follow-up pack invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0005                      |
| alias          | northstar_followup_pack       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-20                    |
| total_eur      | 420                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 2 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 420      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Later invoice after a narrower product pass, still uncomfortably close to consulting if Miles is honest.

next_step.current_state: First finance record updated successfully with frontmatter. Continue execution by updating second requested purchase record; reactive outbox check is not applicable because no outbox channel file was written.
next_step.observation: The invoice target file write completed without reported error.

purchased_on: 2026-04-03
total_eur: 29
counterparty: Haushaltshilfe München
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: HVAC filter pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 18
  - item: replacement gasket tape
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 11
    line_eur: 11
---

## Notes

Recent maintenance receipt that pushed Repair Ledger from vague intention into an active memory lane.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by running both requested finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice and bill records while preserving each original body, then removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS when entering folders, used workflow+schema docs before structured edits, preserved full original note bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR two finance records. Both target files contained all required visible fields from finance schema, enabling exact frontmatter extraction without guessing. Writes succeeded for both files and workflow requires deleting completed inbox item, which was done.
